title: Refactor God Modules: extract session-manager.ts and server.ts into focused modules
acceptance_criteria: session-manager.ts (1441 lines) extracted into: WorktreeManager, ProcessSpawner, ApprovalHandler, PortAllocator, SessionLifecycle
server.ts start() function (~370 lines) extracted into: setupMiddleware, setupRoutes, setupWebSocket, setupTunnel, wireSessionEvents
Each extracted module has single responsibility and clear interface
